completed_tasks.name: Present design sections and get approval
Spec self-review and user review gate

remaining_tasks.name: Invoke writing-plans skill to create implementation plan

human_actions_pending.context: Brainstorming skill requires user approval of written spec before writing-plans is invoked

decisions.decision: MDFType structured type over raw strings
decisions.rationale: Enables type parameter extraction for argument checking and return type resolution
Independently testable, clean seam for Phase C schema injection

decisions.decision: TypedExpr wrapper (Option B) over parallel stack
decisions.rationale: Stack discipline is fragile; wrapper is self-documenting and testable
User specified hard errors; well-formed models have all types defined

decisions.decision: transform_action kwargs for Phase C context (Option A)
decisions.rationale: None defaults preserve backward compat; single entry point
User plans sequential implementation and single release

decisions.decision: Struct field checking in Phase C
decisions.rationale: DomainContext already has attribute_type; dotted_name has both pieces

decisions.decision: Argument type checking in Phase E
decisions.rationale: Requires TypedExpr on arguments to know their types

next_action: User reviews spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-30-type-aware-transformer-design.md, then invoke writing-plans skill
context_notes: Brainstorming session complete. Spec covers Phases A-E: SymbolScope+MDFType+TypeMismatch+UnresolvedType (A-B), DomainContext+struct field checking (C), Optional narrowing separate spec (D), TypedExpr+return types+argument type checking (E).
